en.title: Skill-Chain Dashboard
en.skillDriftRed: red: active duplicate drift needs review
en.dailyEntryBody: Every AI opens the same read-only workspace and checks the skill-chain registry before taking a role.
en.modelRouterAllClear: No cooldown, fatal, or unregistered model lanes.
en.modelRouterStateMissing: Model router state has not been written yet.
en.roleOpenCode: Low-cost execution lane / partial chain support
en.openHintClaude: Read dashboard/data.json assistants[] or open index.html
en.openHintCopilot: Open index.html in a browser; follow dashboard-selected goal packets
en.advisoryEmpty: Select a project with a registered chain to see a read-only recommendation.
en.priorityBody: Top 3 projects sorted by priority. Reason chips explain state blockers, gate risk, classification, chain weight, and recent trace signals.
en.traceExplorerBody: Filter recent cross-AI events by project and kind, then jump back to the relevant project or chain.
en.noTraceMatches: No matching events. Try widening the filters.
en.defaultRationale: Capability registry matched this assistant and chain.
en.capabilityFallback: Capability registry missing; using local skill scan fallback.
en.skillLibraryBody: Structured skill inventory with categories, duplicates, purpose, SOP, importance, and optimization hints.
en.dedupeWatchMissing: No watch snapshot found. Run the read-only watcher once, then reload.
en.noSkills: No skills match the current filters.
en.loadError: Could not load data. Run: python3 /Users/yumei/tools/automation/scripts/skill-chain-dashboard.py --once, then reload. Details:
en.stale.banner.title: Data is stale
en.stale.banner.body: data.json hasn't refreshed for over {minutes} minutes. Check the watch agent: launchctl list | grep skill-chain
en.progressSnapshotSource: Read-only snapshot, not live AI execution. Generated:
en.expectedRedGate: Expected red-before-green gate is present and counted as satisfied.
en.goalNoEvents: No goal_status events yet. Copying a packet does not mean an AI has accepted it.
en.repoEvolverBody: Read-only progress across the five architecture-plan lines, derived from dashboard traces and local evidence paths.
en.repoEvolverSplitBlocked: Phase 5 split/package reconsideration remains blocked until weak/fail gaps and approval-gated mirror work are resolved.
en.repoEvolverSplitUnblocked: Phase 5 split reconsideration is not blocked by current gate evidence.
en.repoEvolverMaintenance: Maintenance audit and continuous refactor queue
en.repoEvolverDocs: Documentation fact verification and stale-claim review
en.repoEvolverMirror: Obsidian mirror policy with Git as canonical truth
en.repoEvolverRestore: Git backup, source manifest, runtime ignore, and restore governance
en.repoEvolverMaintenanceNext: Continue bounded review-first task packets from the daily evolution queue.
en.repoEvolverDocsNext: Review the remaining high-priority stale-claim and command-evidence packets against local source evidence.
en.repoEvolverSkillsNext: Keep skill drift visible in the dashboard and resolve active drift only through review-first lifecycle decisions.
en.repoEvolverMirrorNext: Convert proposed mirror creation into an explicit human approval packet before any Obsidian mutation.
en.repoEvolverRestoreNext: Run the final prompt-to-artifact audit across plan.md phases before considering repo-evolver complete.
en.repoEvolverGapNote.mainline-4-obsidian-m: Proposed mirror still needs explicit approval before any write-back.
en.repoEvolverGapNote.phase-3-obsidian-mirr: Mirror governance is registered, but creation remains approval-required.
en.repoEvolverGapNote.phase-5-stability-bef: Open queue and proposed mirror evidence still block repo/package split reconsideration.
en.dispatchBody: Copy bounded packets for other AI lanes while keeping execution outside the dashboard.
en.dispatchBoundaryScoped: Only edit the controller-approved write scope.
en.dispatchBoundaryNoRuntime: Do not write private runtime ledgers or secret-adjacent files.
en.dispatchBoundaryNoRemote: No push, PR, deploy, sync, SSH, rsync, launchd, or destructive Git actions.
en.dispatchLaneCodexRole: Implementation, local gates, and browser QA for tightly scoped frontend or script work.
en.dispatchLaneClaudeRole: Architecture review, boundary checks, and final acceptance framing.
en.dispatchLaneOpenCodeRole: Low-cost bounded execution or read-only investigation when the write scope is explicit.
en.dispatchLaneCodexTask: Implement the next bounded dashboard slice with focused validation.
en.dispatchLaneClaudeTask: Review the dashboard slice for architecture, safety boundary, and acceptance gaps.
en.dispatchLaneOpenCodeTask: Investigate reusable task-packet data sources and report the smallest safe integration.
en.dispatchLaneClaudeInvoke: Use Claude/parent controller for architecture review and acceptance framing; keep implementation delegated.
en.dispatchLaneDeepSeekFlashRole: DeepSeek-backed read-only UI, queue, and doc-drift review before a controller grants any write scope.
en.dispatchLaneDeepSeekFlashTask: Review the current dashboard slice for readability, stale evidence, and next safe queue item.
en.dispatchLaneOpenCodeGoRole: Daily free-first OpenCode policy route for system investigation and bounded implementation advice; writes require a parent-approved allowlist.
en.dispatchLaneOpenCodeGoTask: Investigate reusable task-packet data sources and propose the smallest safe integration point.

zh.title: Skill-Chain 推进工作台
zh.skillDriftRed: 红色：存在活跃重复漂移
zh.dailyEntry: 每日 AI 协作入口
zh.dailyEntryBody: 各 AI 打开同一个只读工作台，按 skill-chain registry 判断自己能接哪段。
zh.modelRouterAllClear: 没有冷却、致命或未注册模型通道。
zh.modelRouterStateMissing: 模型路由状态尚未写入。
zh.roleClaude: 架构父控 / 路由 / 复审验收
zh.roleCodex: 执行端 / 本地门禁 / 浏览器 QA
zh.roleOpenCode: 低成本执行支线 / 部分链路支持
zh.roleCopilot: IDE 补全 / 小范围编辑辅助
zh.openHintClaude: 读取 dashboard/data.json 的 assistants 段，或打开 index.html
zh.openHintCopilot: 在浏览器打开 index.html，并按工作台选择的 goal packet 执行
zh.advisoryEmpty: 选择一个已注册链路的项目后，会显示只读推荐。
zh.priorityBody: Top 3 项目按优先级排序，原因来自状态阻塞、门禁风险、分类、链路权重和最近追踪信号。
zh.traceExplorerBody: 按项目和事件类型过滤跨 AI 事件，再回到相关项目或链路。
zh.noTraceMatches: 当前筛选没有匹配事件。可以放宽过滤条件。
zh.defaultRationale: 能力注册表匹配了这个 AI 与链路。
zh.capabilityFallback: 未找到能力注册表，正在降级使用本地技能扫描。
zh.skillLibraryBody: 结构化展示技能分类、重复副本、目的、SOP、重要度和优化建议。
zh.dedupeWatchMissing: 未找到观察快照。先运行一次只读 watcher，然后刷新。
zh.noSkills: 当前筛选没有匹配技能。
zh.loadError: 无法加载数据。请运行: python3 /Users/yumei/tools/automation/scripts/skill-chain-dashboard.py --once，然后刷新。详情:
zh.stale.banner.title: 数据陈旧
zh.stale.banner.body: data.json 已超过 {minutes} 分钟未刷新，请检查 launchd watch 进程是否存活：launchctl list | grep skill-chain
zh.taskStateStale: 门禁已满足，状态待回写
zh.progressSnapshotSource: 只读快照，不是 AI 实时执行流。生成时间：
zh.expectedRedGate: 预期的红灯验收已出现，并按通过计入。
zh.goalNoEvents: 还没有任务状态事件。复制任务包不代表 AI 已接手。
zh.repoEvolverBody: 只读展示架构计划五条主线进度，来源是本地 trace、阶段门禁和证据路径。
zh.repoEvolverSplitBlocked: Phase 5 暂时不能考虑拆仓库/拆包：需要先处理偏弱/失败缺口和审批门控的镜像工作。
zh.repoEvolverSplitUnblocked: 当前门禁证据没有阻塞 Phase 5 拆分复议。
zh.repoEvolverNoGaps: 当前没有 repo-evolver 缺口。
zh.repoEvolverMaintenance: 维护审计与持续重构队列
zh.repoEvolverDocs: 文档事实核验与过时声明审查
zh.repoEvolverSkills: Agent 技能生命周期治理
zh.repoEvolverMirror: Obsidian 镜像策略：Git 是唯一真相
zh.repoEvolverRestore: Git 备份、源清单、运行时忽略与恢复治理
zh.repoEvolverMaintenanceNext: 继续从每日演化队列挑选边界清晰、先审后改的任务包。
zh.repoEvolverDocsNext: 继续用本地源码证据复核高优先级过时声明和命令证据任务包。
zh.repoEvolverSkillsNext: 保持技能漂移在看板可见，只通过先审后改的生命周期决策处理活跃漂移。
zh.repoEvolverMirrorNext: 把拟创建的镜像转成明确人工审批包，再考虑任何 Obsidian 写入。
zh.repoEvolverRestoreNext: 先对 plan.md 阶段跑最终提示到工件审计，再判断 repo-evolver 是否完成。
zh.repoEvolverGapNote.mainline-4-obsidian-m: 拟创建镜像仍需要明确人工审批，不能自动写回。
zh.repoEvolverGapNote.phase-3-obsidian-mirr: 镜像治理已登记，但创建动作仍处于审批门控。
zh.repoEvolverGapNote.phase-5-stability-bef: 开放队列和拟建镜像证据仍在阻塞拆仓库/拆包复议。
zh.dispatchBody: 把有边界的任务包复制给其他 AI，同时保持真实执行在 dashboard 之外。
zh.dispatchBoundaryScoped: 只修改父控任务包批准的写入范围。
zh.dispatchBoundaryNoRuntime: 不写私有 runtime ledger 或 secrets 邻近文件。
zh.dispatchBoundaryNoRemote: 不 push、PR、deploy、sync、SSH、rsync、launchd 或破坏性 Git 操作。
zh.dispatchLaneCodexRole: 负责边界清晰的前端或脚本实现、本地门禁和浏览器 QA。
zh.dispatchLaneClaudeRole: 负责架构复审、边界检查和最终验收口径。
zh.dispatchLaneOpenCodeRole: 负责低成本有界执行，或在写入范围明确时做只读探查。
zh.dispatchLaneCodexTask: 实现下一块有界 dashboard slice，并跑聚焦验证。
zh.dispatchLaneClaudeTask: 复审 dashboard slice 的架构、安全边界和验收缺口。
zh.dispatchLaneOpenCodeTask: 探查可复用 task-packet 数据源，并回报最小安全集成点。
zh.dispatchLaneClaudeInvoke: Claude/父控负责架构复审和验收口径；实现继续外派。
zh.dispatchLaneDeepSeekFlashRole: DeepSeek 支持的只读审查 UI、队列和 doc-drift，在父控批准写入范围前不改文件。
zh.dispatchLaneDeepSeekFlashTask: 审查当前 dashboard slice 的可读性、证据新鲜度和下一条安全队列项。
zh.dispatchLaneOpenCodeGoRole: 每日优先消耗免费额度的 OpenCode 策略路由，用于系统探查和有界实现建议；写入必须先拿到父控 allowlist。
zh.dispatchLaneOpenCodeGoTask: 探查可复用 task-packet 数据源，并提出最小安全集成点。
